mapper.insert: insert into individual_group ( user_id, group_id, position, status ) values ( #{studentId}, #{groupId}, #{position}, #{status} )
mapper.select:
select
from individual_group ig where ig.group_id = #{groupId} and ig.status = 1
and ig.user_id like concat('%', #{searchInfo}, '%')

select
from individual_group ig where ig.group_id = #{groupId} and ig.status = 0

select
from individual_group ig
ig.user_id like concat('%', #{searchInfo}, '%')
select g.id, g.name, count(ig.user_id) as memberNum from `group` g left join individual_group ig on g.id = ig.group_id group by g.id, g.name order by memberNum desc limit 5
